context: Tests whether the agent correctly applies dry-run mode (no file writes, 'Would Update' labels), handles the two-factor scoping rule (undocumented symbols get only 'Missing coverage', not auto-documented), and treats Python 3.9+ generic type-hint modernization (List→list, Dict→dict) as a non-event that does not trigger documentation updates.

checklist.name: Dry-run mode used
checklist.description: The skill is invoked without --apply (dry-run by default); no source files are modified

checklist.name: Would Update label
checklist.description: The report uses 'Would Update' (not 'Updated') for the analyze() docstring entry, consistent with dry-run mode

checklist.name: Proposed stays Proposed
checklist.description: Any README candidate sections appear as 'Proposed' (not 'Would Propose') in the dry-run report

checklist.name: analyze() param flagged
checklist.description: The report identifies analyze() as having a new parameter (verbose) that needs documentation

checklist.name: Generic types not a change
checklist.description: process_items() is NOT listed as a symbol requiring documentation updates due to List→list / Dict→dict type hint changes

checklist.name: Undocumented symbol not auto-documented
checklist.description: _compute_hash is reported as 'Missing coverage' only — no docstring is created or proposed for it

checklist.name: Missing coverage report
checklist.description: The report includes a 'Missing Coverage' section (or equivalent) mentioning _compute_hash

checklist.name: README prose excluded
checklist.description: The 'analyze function' mention in README prose (no backtick code span) is NOT included as a candidate for a README proposal

checklist.name: README backtick included
checklist.description: The backtick mention of `process_items` in the README is identified as a candidate section (code span match)

checklist.name: CHANGELOG not touched
checklist.description: CHANGELOG.md is not modified and does not appear as a target for updates in the report

checklist.name: Report saved to file
checklist.description: A file named doc-sync-report.md exists in the working directory containing the skill's output
